ArchitectureNotes.objective: Ship and maintain the GRACE methodology as a Claude Code marketplace plugin + npm-published CLI, with a self-dogfooded reference project so agents cannot forget the framework they ship.
ArchitectureNotes.non-goal: Be a generic engineering-advice framework. GRACE is domain-specific (contract-first, graph-anchored, verification-first) — the skills are not interchangeable with plain prompting rules.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-1: Drift between canonical `skills/grace/*` and packaged `plugins/grace/skills/grace/*`. Mitigated by scripts/validate-marketplace.ts.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-2: LLM forgets to activate GRACE when the repo is GRACE-managed. Mitigated by the using-grace meta-skill + SessionStart hook + CLAUDE.md preamble.
ArchitectureNotes.risk-3: Skill docs drift out of the three-section discipline (Common Rationalizations / When NOT to Use / Verification). Mitigated by `grace lint` skill-section warnings.

contract.purpose: Aggregate and dispatch grace subcommands (lint, module, file, status).
Expose `grace status` with text/json output and a --brief mode for SessionStart hooks.
Pure computation: artifact presence, counts, next-action heuristic, renderers.
Warn when a SKILL.md lacks Common Rationalizations, When NOT to Use, or Verification sections.

export-lintSkillSections.PURPOSE: Scan skills/ and plugins/ for SKILL.md files

contract.purpose: citty subcommand that wires `grace lint` arguments to the lint engine.
Validate artifacts, unique-tag XML, semantic markup, governed files, skill-section discipline.
Language-specific exports/imports analysis (TypeScript AST, Python regex).
citty subcommand `grace module find` / `grace module show`.
Index GRACE artifacts (graph, plan, verification, governed files) and answer module/file queries.
Render query results as human-readable text.
Canonical source of truth for the 15 shipped skills.
Exact mirror of canonical skills for marketplace distribution.
Claude Code marketplace manifest declaring the grace plugin and its shipped skills.
Script validating canonical/packaged sync, version consistency, and manifest structure.

Phase-0.name: Baseline
Phase-0.goal: Establish baseline tag and feature branch for hardening-pass-1.
Phase-0.step-3: Write PLAN.md (Markdown source) for the upgrade.
Phase-0.checkpoint: Plan is reviewable; no code modified yet.

Phase-1.name: Activation Mechanisms
Phase-1.goal: Make it hard for Claude Code to forget GRACE: meta-skill, SessionStart hook, CLAUDE.md preamble.
Phase-1.step-1: Create `using-grace` meta-skill with EXTREMELY-IMPORTANT block and activation flowchart.
Phase-1.step-3: Add `settings.json.template` in grace-init assets for SessionStart hook.
Phase-1.step-4: Add `CLAUDE.md.template` in grace-init assets with CRITICAL preamble.
Phase-1.step-5: Update grace-init SKILL.md to emit CLAUDE.md and .claude/settings.json.
Phase-1.checkpoint: Fresh `grace-init` produces CLAUDE.md + settings.json; `grace status --brief` exits 0 with <=30 lines of output.

Phase-2.name: Skill Sweep
Phase-2.goal: Apply three discipline sections to all 15 skills.
Phase-2.step-1: Add Common Rationalizations, When NOT to Use, Verification to every `skills/grace/*/SKILL.md`.

Phase-3.name: Deep Reworks
Phase-3.goal: Substantive upgrades on the five most load-bearing skills.
Phase-3.step-1: Rewrite grace-fix around the Prove-It Pattern (Locate -> Prove -> Fix -> Verify -> Guard).
Phase-3.step-2: Rewrite grace-reviewer with a 5-axis framework and severity labels.
Phase-3.step-3: Add Wave Success Thresholds and Pre-Wave Checklist to grace-multiagent-execute.
Phase-3.step-4: Add phases-with-checkpoints and dependency discipline to grace-plan.
Phase-3.step-5: Rewrite grace-ask around progressive disclosure (4-level context hierarchy).
Phase-3.checkpoint: Each of the five skills cites its new pattern in its frontmatter description.

Phase-4.name: CLI Support
Phase-4.goal: CLI support for the new patterns.
Phase-4.step-2: `grace lint` warns on missing skill sections.

Phase-5.name: Reference Project
Phase-5.goal: Grace-marketplace itself becomes a GRACE-managed project (reference example).
Phase-5.step-1: Create `docs/knowledge-graph.xml` describing CLI modules and skill collections.
Phase-5.step-3: Create `docs/verification-plan.xml` with V-M-xxx for each module.
Phase-5.checkpoint: `grace lint --path .` exits 0 (warnings ok); `grace module find` returns expected module list.

ExecutionPolicy.worker-owns: Single-module source edits under src/ and their module-local tests.
ExecutionPolicy.mirror-discipline: Every change under `skills/grace/*` must be copied to `plugins/grace/skills/grace/*` in the same commit; validate-marketplace enforces this.
